discrepancies.scope: This researcher's own arXiv-ID probe guesses
discrepancies.details: Spec §5 P3 (Mazzocco), P4 (Bonelli-Lisovyy-Tanzini), P8 (Lisovyy-Roussillon) are stated by author + year only without specific arXiv IDs. This researcher attempted 4 arXiv-ID guesses to find canonical preprints: arXiv:2407.21184 → resolves to 'Optical Computing for DNN Acceleration' (cs.AR; Pasricha 2024); arXiv:2305.17839 → 'Absolute light yield of EJ-204 plastic scintillator' (physics.ins-det; Brown et al. 2023); arXiv:1612.08719 → 'Equilibrium mappings in polar-isotropic confined active particles' (cond-mat.soft; Fily-Baskaran-Hagan 2016); arXiv:1806.08398 → 'Things that go bump in the night: From J/ψφ to other mass spectrum' (hep-ph; Yi 2018). NONE relate to Painlevé III / connection coefficients / Stokes data.
discrepancies.anchor_to_prior_finding: Same hallucination pattern as 031 WITTE-FORRESTER-2010-ACQUISITION verdict 2026-05-04 where DOI 10.1088/1751-8113/43/23/235202 + arXiv:0911.1762 both resolved to unrelated 2010 papers
discrepancies.resolution: Per copilot-instructions Bibliographic ID Pre-Verification rule: do NOT cite hallucinated IDs; revert to author-and-year-only NIA tagging in dossier rows C.P3 / C.P4 / C.P5 / C.P8; flag here for synthesizer review
discrepancies.action_taken: Dossier rows C.P3 / C.P4 / C.P8 carry NIA tags with explicit pre-resolution-failure rationale; this discrepancy logged for synthesizer escalation; NO hallucinated IDs cited in dossier prose or claims.jsonl entries

discrepancies.spec_citation: Ramis-Sibuya 1996, 'A new proof of multisummability of formal power series solutions of ODE', Funkcialaj Ekvacioj 39 (1996) 139-163
discrepancies.discrepancy: Braaksma 1992 NUMDAM bibliography reference [16] (verified verbatim in this session) cites Ramis-Sibuya, 'Hukuhara domains and fundamental existence and uniqueness theorems for asymptotic solutions of Gevrey type', Asymp. Analysis 2 (1989) 39-94 — different paper, different journal, different year
discrepancies.resolution: Both papers exist independently (Braaksma references the 1989 Asymp. Analysis paper; the spec cites the 1996 Funkcialaj Ekvacioj paper); both are by Ramis-Sibuya; cross-reference recorded for synthesizer awareness
discrepancies.action_taken: Dossier row A.P5 notes both citations; not a fabrication, just spec-vs-corpus citation-overlap

discrepancies.spec_citation: Chowla-Selberg 1949, 'On Epstein's Zeta-function', J. reine angew. Math. 227, pp. 86-110
discrepancies.discrepancy: GDZ verifies J. reine angew. Math. (Crelle) vol. 227 is from 1967, not 1949; the 1949 Chowla-Selberg paper is the SHORT note in PNAS 35 (1949) 371-374; the long Crelle paper appeared 1967. Spec conflates 1949 PNAS short note with 1967 Crelle long paper
discrepancies.resolution: Documented in dossier row B.P1; landing page year-of-volume verified as 1967 via GDZ metadata
discrepancies.action_taken: Dossier row B.P1 carries clarification; not a fabrication
